articles.title: Genealogy triggers arrest over decades-old assaults
articles.description: Groundbreaking DNA technology has led to a string of charges against a man for three separate sexual assaults, some dating back 30 years.
articles.content:
A major breakthrough has been made in the long-running mystery of three sexual assaults, including one on an 11-year-old girl, after the use of pioneering DNA technology.
Forensic Investigative Genetic Genealogy is an emerging technology in Australia... [2440 chars]

articles.title: Tighter takedown rules are for all social media content
articles.description: The amendments to the Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules drastically shortening the time frames for intermediaries to remove content are applicable to all content, and not only those generated with artificial intelligence (AI), according to legal experts.

articles.title: Metra trains delayed because of technology issues, agency says
articles.description: Trains on numerous Metra lines were delayed Wednesday due to issues with Positive Train Control systems, the agency said.
articles.content:
Trains on numerous Metra lines were delayed Wednesday due to issues with Positive Train Control systems, the agency said.
According to an alert sent out just before 6 p.m., those issues were causing trains on numerous lines to be delayed at their ori... [1053 chars]

articles.title: Beyond TCS and Infosys: This mid-cap technology stock just saw a 11% institutional stake jump

articles.title: drone technology said to cause El Paso airspace closure
articles.description: Federal Aviation Administration officials were forced to close the airspace over El Paso, Texas, late Tuesday after the Defense Department decided to use new anti-drone technology without giving aviation officials ample time to assess the risks to commercial airlines, according to four people briefed on the situation.
articles.content: The military has been developing high-energy laser technology to intercept and destroy drones, which the Trump administration has said are used by Mexican cartels to track Border Patrol agents and smuggle drugs into the United States. According to th... [5005 chars]
